Issuer: River Bay Retail Public Company Limited (SET:QX00; ISIN THX000000001) and Investor: Meridian Delta Holdings Pte. Ltd. propose a strategic private placement of new shares in the Issuer.
Structure: Subscription of new ordinary shares equal to approximately 18% of post-issue share capital; final share price to be determined with a licensed Thai broker prior to EGM.
Use of proceeds: As described in the Issuer’s publicly available 2025 Form 56-1 One Report and the press release dated 10 March 2025, proceeds will support logistics hub expansion in Chonburi and Khon Kaen.
Disclosure: The Issuer will submit an Immediate Report on Board Resolutions via SETLink and publish the EGM notice in Thai and English in accordance with SET disclosure rules.
Intentional MNPI: The Issuer’s board has approved the private placement in principle, and no SETLink submission or public notice has been made as of the date of this term sheet; selective pre-sounding with two domestic lenders occurred under NDA.
Regulatory and filings: Shareholder approval under the Public Limited Companies Act, compliance with relevant CMSB notifications for private placements, and Investor to file Form 246-2 with the Office of the Securities and Exchange Commission (Thailand) within 3 business days after closing.
Conditions precedent: SET approval to list the newly issued shares, any Thai SEC acknowledgments, and any applicable waiver from silent period restrictions under SET Notification SorJor.00/0000.
Timing: Indicative signing window in Q3/2569 (2026) with EGM targeted within 45 days thereafter; timelines remain subject to public announcement under SET practice.
Blackout and MNPI handling: Insider trading restrictions follow the Issuer’s public Insider Trading Policy dated 1 February 2024; no trades by insiders from EGM notice date until 24 hours after corresponding SETLink disclosure.
Employment and incentives: No change to existing employment terms; any option grants will follow the ESOP plan previously disclosed in the 2024 Annual Report and will not be priced using undisclosed information.
Announcements: Public communications will be coordinated by corporate communications; media may reference the Issuer’s 2 May 2025 warehouse automation pilot announcement without discussing forward-looking pricing or volumes.
Cross-border funding: Subscription funds will be remitted from Singapore in THB; KYC to be completed per AML/CFT guidelines; any personal data submitted will be limited to role-based contacts and processed under the Issuer’s PDPA Notice (contact: dpo@riverbay.example).
Other terms: 45-day exclusivity; cost sharing as per prior public SEC/SET filing ref. SEC-XYZ/2566-0000; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law.
Governing law and dispute resolution: Thai law governs; disputes to the Thai Arbitration Institute; documents will be in Thai and English, with Thai prevailing for filings with the SEC and SET.
